samples.input: Read the luminosity config value core.example.

messages.content: Read the luminosity config value core.example.

arguments.description: Check for luminosity CLI and list repo contents
Read luminosity config value core.example
Inspect luminosity local config file raw contents
List luminosity config directory contents

messages.content:
`core.example` = **team-v**, defined in `.luminosity/config.md`.

Note: `luminosity config get` itself errored out because `.luminosity/config.local.md` has malformed frontmatter — it opens with `---` but never closes it (just `key: value` on one line, no closing delimiter), so the CLI can't parse the local override file at all. I read the value directly from `config.md` instead. Let me know if you'd like me to fix the local config file's frontmatter.

`core.example` = **team-v**, defined in `.luminosity/config.md`.

Note: `luminosity config get` itself errored out because `.luminosity/config.local.md` has malformed frontmatter — it opens with `---` but never closes it (just `key: value` on one line, no closing delimiter), so the CLI can't parse the local override file at all. I read the value directly from `config.md` instead. Let me know if you'd like me to fix the local config file's frontmatter.

samples.input: Read the luminosity config value core.example.

messages.content: Read the luminosity config value core.example.

arguments.description: Check for luminosity CLI and list repo contents
Inspect .luminosity directory and CLI help

arguments.command: luminosity config get core.example 2>&1 || luminosity config --help 2>&1
arguments.description: Read luminosity config value core.example
Read core.example from team-level config only

messages.content:
The read fails for the default (personal-over-team) resolution because `.luminosity/config.local.md` has malformed frontmatter — it's missing the closing `---` delimiter:

```
---
key: value
```

That causes `luminosity config get core.example` to error with `malformed frontmatter: unterminated frontmatter block` before it can fall through to the team value.

Reading just the team level works: `core.example` = **`team-v`** (from `.luminosity/config.md`).

If you want the plain `get` command to work again, the local file needs a closing `---` added, e.g.:
```
---
key: value
---
```
Want me to fix `.luminosity/config.local.md`?

sample.input: Read the luminosity config value core.example.

messages.content: Read the luminosity config value core.example.

arguments.description: Check for luminosity CLI and list repo contents
Inspect .luminosity directory and CLI help

arguments.command: luminosity config get core.example 2>&1 || luminosity config --help 2>&1
arguments.description: Read luminosity config value core.example
Read core.example from team-level config only

attachments.b5a391e4b2643a0bb38a5c50b9a4b2d7:
The read fails for the default (personal-over-team) resolution because `.luminosity/config.local.md` has malformed frontmatter — it's missing the closing `---` delimiter:

```
---
key: value
```

That causes `luminosity config get core.example` to error with `malformed frontmatter: unterminated frontmatter block` before it can fall through to the team value.

Reading just the team level works: `core.example` = **`team-v`** (from `.luminosity/config.md`).

If you want the plain `get` command to work again, the local file needs a closing `---` added, e.g.:
```
---
key: value
---
```
Want me to fix `.luminosity/config.local.md`?

Read luminosity config value core.example

messages.content: The local config file has a syntax error that's blocking the read. Let me look at it.

arguments.description: List luminosity config directory contents

messages.content:
The `luminosity config get core.example` command fails — `.luminosity/config.local.md` has malformed frontmatter (missing the closing `---` delimiter):

```
---
key: value
```

I inspected both config files directly instead:
- **`.luminosity/config.md`** (team config): `core.example: team-v`
- **`.luminosity/config.local.md`** (local override): broken frontmatter, so its content can't be parsed — it just has `key: value` with no `core` section visible anyway

So the merged value the CLI *would* report, once the local file is fixed, is likely `team-v` (assuming the local file doesn't override `core.example`). Want me to fix the local file's frontmatter (add the missing closing `---`) so `luminosity config get` works normally?

sample.input: Read the luminosity config value core.example.

messages.content: Read the luminosity config value core.example.
